title: 30cm Round Rattan Tray, Woven Serving Tray with Cut - Out Handles, Wicker Serving Basket by YANGQIHOME, Whitewash
features: Material: 100% Rattan, provides you durable quality and natural touch.The sturdy base and the braided fibres provides strength and durability for multi-purpose use.
Size: This tray measured about 11.8 inch x 2 inch (30 cm x 5 cm), suitable for serving food, fruit, coffee, tea, dessert, bread, cake, dinner, breakfast, etc.Also a perfect gift for hostess or bride.
Cut - Out Handles: Designed with cut - out handles makes you convenient to transport the tray from living room to bedroom or bathroom.
Perfect Decoration: This classic tray is suitable for storing all your decor items on countertop, tabletop, coffee table, elegant looking adds natural pastoral style to your home.
Easy Cleaning: Clean the tray with a damp cloth and keep dry after cleaning.
description: Product Description YANGQIHOME Rattan Serving Tray YAGNQIHOME Rattan Round Bread Basket Material: 100% Rattan, this wicker tray provides you durable quality and natural touch. Color: Natural / Whitewash. Size: 30 / 34 cm (diameter) wooden tray for your choosing. Widely Used: YANGQIHOME rattan basket is suitable for storing cosmetic skin care products in bedroom, keys, buttons, remote control in living room, fruit, bread, dessert, cake in kitchen. Also perfect decoration to your home. Care Guide: Clean the round tray with a damp cloth and keep dry after cleaning. Service: Any question or problem, please let us know, we will reply you within 24 hours.
